untranslatable_reason: Measured Move Pattern requires multi-leg identification and calculation of first leg magnitude (highest high to lowest low) to compute target price. This requires historical state tracking and custom calculations beyond available indicators. Pattern needs: (1) detection of completed first leg decline, (2) identification of corrective phase high, (3) subtraction of first leg length from corrective high. These are pattern-structure conditions, not indicator-based signals. Approximated with trend reversal and momentum indicators, but true pattern mechanics cannot be fully expressed.
